options.content:
Audits monitoring and observability tools deployed across clusters, showing CPU and memory resource consumption. Enables comparison between the current monitoring landscape and the GiantSwarm observability platform to support consolidation conversations.

**GiantSwarm components:** management cluster (all namespaces) · workload cluster `kube-system`  
**Customer components:** workload cluster namespaces outside `kube-system`  
**Detected tools:** DataDog, Instana, Prometheus, Alertmanager, Alloy, New Relic, Elastic/APM, Dynatrace, Grafana, Mimir, Loki, Tempo, Pyroscope, Beyla, OpenTelemetry, VictoriaMetrics, Vector, Fluent Bit, Fluentd, Promtail, Telegraf

targets.expr: sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*datadog.*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*datadog.*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*instana.*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*instana.*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(prometheus|alertmanager).*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(prometheus|alertmanager).*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*alloy.*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*alloy.*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*newrelic.*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*newrelic.*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(elastic|apm-server|metricbeat|filebeat|logstash|kibana).*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(elastic|apm-server|metricbeat|filebeat|logstash|kibana).*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*dynatrace.*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*dynatrace.*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*grafana.*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*grafana.*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*mimir.*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*mimir.*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*loki.*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*loki.*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*tempo.*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*tempo.*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*pyroscope.*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*pyroscope.*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*beyla.*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*beyla.*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(otel|opentelemetry).*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(otel|opentelemetry).*"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="management_cluster", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(victoriametrics|vmagent|vmalert|vminsert|vmselect|vmstorage|vmsingle).*"} or kube_pod_container_resource_requests{cluster_id=~"$cluster", cluster_type="workload_cluster", namespace="kube-system", resource="cpu", pod=~".*(victoriametrics|vmagent|vmalert|vminsert|vmselect|vmstorage|vmsingle).*"})

panels.title: Customer Workload Clusters — Detected Monitoring Tool Pods
panels.description: Pods matching known monitoring tool patterns in customer-controlled namespaces. Sorted by pod name. Use the all-namespaces bar gauges below to spot tools not captured here.

panels.title: Efficiency — Detected Monitoring Tools (Customer Workload Clusters)
Customer Monitoring Tools — Actual CPU vs Requested
Customer Monitoring Tools — Actual Memory vs Requested
All Customer Namespaces — Catch-all (spot undetected tools)
